official_functions.role: Decode and encode the official Play clientbound rotate_head primitive fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official entity-id and head-rotation body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns rotate_head to packet id 0x53.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the rotate_head id to ClientboundRotateHeadPacket.
The official rotate_head body is entity id VarInt followed by a signed yHeadRot byte.
The fixture uses primitive fields only and does not require initialized Entity or Level state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
